Jiang Simin

Copied

Chinese volunteers are a mainstay at the Olympics. From Beijing to London, Rio to PyeongChang, and the upcoming Paris 2024, many of them have served at multiple editions of the Games. Their bright smiles and positive energy have made the experience enjoyable for both players and spectators. In this video, they share some of their Olympic memories.
